question: Based on the chart, how does the exam score appear to change as the study time (in hours) appears to increase?

options.A: Exam scores appear to increase with more study time.
options.B: Exam scores appear to decrease with more study time.
options.C: Exam scores appear to stay roughly constant as study time changes.
options.D: The relationship between study time and exam score cannot be determined from the chart.

explanation: The chart uses an inverted x-axis, which can flip the apparent direction of the relationship. The correct option reflects the actual pattern in the data.
